title: What was with the swimming Reis in EoE
display_title: What was with the swimming Reis in EoE
wikitext:
[]: What was with the swimming Reis in EoE?             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Tue May 03, 2011 2:42 pm Title says it's all: When Shinji gets absorbed into Giant Lillith Vagina Forehead he sees swarms of Reis swimming around. So, what I want to know is, why? I doubt it's the Reiquarium since Lillith seemed to be collecting souls and the whole point of the Reiquarium was to store soulless husks.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue May 03, 2011 2:44 pm fanservice they're naked so it's fanservice

[]: Re: What was with the swimming Reis in EoE?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 03, 2011 2:52 pm liquidus118 wrote: Title says it's all: When Shinji gets absorbed into Giant Lillith Vagina Forehead he sees swarms of Reis swimming around. So, what I want to know is, why? I doubt it's the Reiquarium since Lillith seemed to be collecting souls and the whole point of the Reiquarium was to store soulless husks.

[]: Re: What was with the swimming Reis in EoE?             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Tue May 03, 2011 3:00 pm Kendrix wrote: Perhaps these are the ghostly Reis swarming out to collect everyone's souls/tang them?

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Tue May 03, 2011 4:03 pm Maybe it's metaphorical cells. You know, like if you shrunk down to microscopic size and went into your veins, you'd see a bunch of blood cells swarming around; except in this case, it's Reis. Here's how I see it: Lilith=progenitor of humans; humans=DNA. Cells contain DNA; humans contain cells; Rei represents Lilith, but also represents humans. If Lilith contains Reis, in a way, she's representing the entirety of human population with her "Rei-cells" (for lack of a better term. Not really cells, but...well...you know.) ...well, it kind of makes sense. Yeah, if you close one eye, tilt your head, close the other eye... Either that, or Shinji was just so obsessed with Rei at this point that all he wanted to see was a bunch of Reis swimming around inside Lilith. Oh, Shinji. You and your silly antics.

[]:             Quote Post by katastroff » Tue May 03, 2011 4:10 pm I thought it clearly looked like sperm, and them swimming around the "black egg" seems t support that. The whole instrumentality sequence is symbolic of "returning to the womb," or complete escape from reality so as to be unborn.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 03, 2011 6:13 pm katastroff wrote: I thought it clearly looked like sperm, and them swimming around the "black egg" seems t support that. The whole instrumentality sequence is symbolic of "returning to the womb," or complete escape from reality so as to be unborn.

[]:             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Tue May 03, 2011 8:31 pm Because... A. It fitted what Shinji was going through at the time. B. It looked cool. C. Of something science related or D. Of Symbolical reasons. Hey, ask a simple question, get a simple answer.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue May 03, 2011 9:01 pm Is it just me, or do those little white Reis look an awful lot like sperm? Ah, that doesn't make much sense either. Except that it could symbolize the thought Rei planted inside her head about how she wanted Third Impact to happen. The sperm-ish looking Rei's symbolizing the source of the idea, The vagina fore-head Rei symbolizing the path way to the uterus brain, and the body symbolizing the development of that idea into physicality and action. Actually, that does kinda make sense...

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Tue May 03, 2011 10:25 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Is it just me, or do those little white Reis look an awful lot like sperm?

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Wed May 04, 2011 2:45 pm I always figured the instrumentalized souls had taken on the form of those Reis, which is why they were swimming around inside of her.

[]:             Quote Post by AshPhoenix » Wed May 04, 2011 9:34 pm rhfxz1s wrote: I always figured the instrumentalized souls had taken on the form of those Reis, which is why they were swimming around inside of her.

[]:             Quote Post by ed » Wed May 11, 2011 9:11 am maybe it's what the anti-ATfield looks like,as what happen in NERV in EoE,and every sperm-like Rei contains a man's soul,it's proved that at the end of EoE,the souls return to the earth
